context: Agent completes all four validator checklists against a mostly well-formed Terragrunt project and produces a structured report with correct pass/fail assessments.

checklist.name: Configuration Pattern Checklist completed
checklist.description: Agent assesses all five Configuration Pattern items. Named include (pass), root file naming (pass - root.hcl), env.hcl naming (pass), find_in_parent_folders with explicit filename (pass), read_terragrunt_config usage (pass).

checklist.name: Dependency Management Checklist completed
checklist.description: Agent assesses all four Dependency Management items. mock_outputs present (pass), mock_outputs_allowed_terraform_commands present (pass), relative config_path (pass), circular dep check requires dag graph (noted).

checklist.name: Security Checklist completed with correct findings
checklist.description: Agent correctly identifies: encrypt=true present (pass), DynamoDB locking present (pass), no hardcoded credentials (pass - uses assume_role), no obvious sensitive variable issues (pass). Terragrunt version constraint present (pass).

checklist.name: DRY Principle Checklist completed
checklist.description: Agent assesses: generate block present (pass), version constraints present (pass), shared locals in env.hcl (pass). Agent may note that vpc_security_group_ids is empty which could be a real-world issue.

checklist.name: Summary table present
checklist.description: Report includes a summary table showing pass/fail counts for each of the four checklists.

checklist.name: Validation commands listed
checklist.description: Report lists at least: terragrunt hcl fmt --check, terragrunt dag graph, and terragrunt run --all validate as the next commands to run.
